{{Infobox character
| name = Yakir
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Yakir]] is a sergeant.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Yakir]] is a representative of [[Malachi]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Yakir]] has command of the unit in the absence of [[Traveler]] [[Cormac]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Malachi]] hoped [[Yakir]] would keep [[Cormac]] in line.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
